summary: Comprehensive feature verification test for Rebel Trade Network. All 49 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified working across all major features: Auth, Feed, Trade Network, Trade Deals, Messages, Gallery, Profile, Admin Dashboard, Invites, Push Notifications. Mobile and tablet responsive layouts working correctly with bottom navigation. Dark theme with orange accents looks professional.

backend: GET /api/admin/stats requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
frontend: Login page loads with homestead background
Feed displays posts with user info, badges, offering/looking for sections
Left sidebar navigation (Feed, Trade Deals, My Trade Network, Messages, Invite Members, Profile)
Right sidebar (Nearby Homesteaders, Potential Matches, Network Stats)
Trade Network page shows connections, requests, recommendations tabs
Trade Deals page shows incoming, outgoing, history tabs
Profile page shows editable fields (name, location, bio, skills, goods)
Invite Members page shows generate link and active invites
Admin Dashboard shows stats (users, posts, messages, connections, invites)
Admin Dashboard tabs (Overview, Users, Posts, Activity Log)
Mobile bottom navigation (Feed, Network, Post, Messages, Profile)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend modular routes structure working correctly
Admin role enforcement working (403 for non-admin)
Encryption working for sensitive data (location, bio, messages)
WebSocket manager integrated for real-time messaging
Object storage integration working for file uploads
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed posts, comments, trades, and invites that are cleaned up automatically.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive feature verification complete. All backend APIs working (49/49 tests pass). Frontend UI verified across all pages: Feed, Trade Network, Trade Deals, Messages, Profile, Invite Members, Admin Dashboard. Mobile responsive design working with bottom navigation. Dark theme with orange accents. PWA install option available. Encryption notice displayed. No critical issues found.

AUTH_FLOW.details: Login/logout with demo user, admin user, invalid credentials rejection, session persistence all working

FEED.details: Post creation, display, like/unlike, comment threading (2 levels), nearby filter all working

TRADE_NETWORK.details: Connections, pending requests, recommended traders, network status all working

TRADE_DEALS.details: Create trade offer, incoming/outgoing trades, history, active count all working

MESSAGING.details: Conversations list, send/receive messages, WebSocket integration working

GALLERY.details: Gallery items display, like functionality working

PROFILE.details: View own profile, edit profile, view other user profile, nearby users all working

ADMIN.details: Admin stats, user management, post management, audit log all working with proper role enforcement

INVITES.details: Create invite, validate invite, view my invites all working

PUSH_NOTIFICATIONS.details: VAPID key endpoint, subscription status working

MOBILE_UI.details: Bottom navigation, responsive layout working on mobile (390x844) and tablet (768x1024)

THEME.details: Dark theme with orange accents, theme toggle present

PWA.details: Install App option visible in sidebar

CATEGORIES.details: Goods, skills, services categories all returning data
